name: Fabian
cooked: Identifying a move as relevant to highlight (“weird”) should also be looked at through the Bitcoin Network lens. If there is a move but no nodes are/were ever hosted in it, it’s not that interesting probably. But if the change contains IPs which host nodes, especially a lot of them, then it should be more interesting to check out.
topic_title: ASmap dashboard: tracking the asmap-data history against the observed network
